name: Cautious Starter
description: A conservative starter template for new users. Read-only access with strict rate limits and approval for any write operation.

rules.name: Strict Global Rate Limit
rules.description: Limit all actions to 50 per hour globally.

rules.name: Block Destructive Actions
rules.description: Block all delete and destructive operations.

rules.name: Require Approval for Writes
rules.description: Any write/send/create action requires human approval.
